news_items.headline: How Anthropic uses Claude in Product Engineering
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 32K views] Product engineers lose hours toggling between tools and tackling subtasks one at a time. Software engineer Chuma Kabaghe shows how she uses Claude Code to onboard onto unfamiliar codebases in minutes, run autonomous testing loops, and manage parallel coding sessions, reducing context switching and shipping faster.

Check out other stories in the "How Anthropic uses Claude" series, below:

news_items.headline: How to build apps faster with Android Studio Panda
news_items.summary:
[Google DeepMind · 5K views] This video explores the latest features in Android Studio Panda releases, making app development smarter and more efficient. Discover how AI-powered tools like the New Project Assistant and Version Upgrade Assistant streamline your workflow. Learn about enhanced agent capabilities, improved control with granular permissions, and specialized templates for car app development and generative AI.

news_items.headline: What is Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform?
news_items.summary:
[Google Cloud Tech · 4K views] Ready to take your AI development to the next level? Discover how the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform gives developers a clean path from writing their first lines of code to running secure, scalable agents in production. Join Holt Skinner as he dives into the complete agent lifecycle, and be sure to check out the linked resources below to try out the tutorials for yourself.

GitHub repository (tutorials/notebooks) → https://goo.gle/agent-platform-github
Agent Development Kit (ADK) → https://goo

news_items.headline: Introducing Agents CLI in Agent Platform
news_items.summary:
[Google for Developers · 4K views] Discover Agents CLI in Agent Platform, a powerful new set of commands and skills to streamline the entire agent development lifecycle, designed for both coding agents and human users.

Agents CLI serves as a dedicated bridge for the Google Cloud agent ecosystem, providing a collection of pre-bundled skills that allow your coding agents (such as Gemini CLI and Antigravity) to build, evaluate, and deploy new agents automatically. By wrapping essential Google Cloud services into a single, intuitive

news_items.headline: Agentic AI for Financial Advisors: Portfolio Analysis, Client Experience and More
news_items.summary:
[AWS Events · 804 views] n this episode of "AWS Show and Tell - GenAI for Financial Advisors: Portfolio Analysis & Client Experience Tools," we explore the art of the possible for integrating Generative AI capabilities into enterprise financial services platforms. Built on a foundation of reusable MCP tools, optimized agentic microservices, and modernized data architectures, this session demonstrates how AWS enables financial advisors to deliver smarter, faster, and more personalized client experiences.
